rationale: Educ. Code §21.041 governs State Board for Educator Certification rules and fees. It is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 21.041. RULES; FEES. (a) The board may adopt rules as necessary for its own procedures.
_note: Rule text concerns educator certification; no overlap with proposed homestead exemption increase.
